description_long: This object is a monumental stone structure resembling a classical obelisk, set atop a multi-tiered rectangular base. The main shaft is tall and rectangular, with smooth, unadorned surfaces and a muted gray stone appearance. A single, prominent fluted column with a Corinthian capital stands adjacent to the obelisk, partially integrated into the base platform. The base itself is composed of several stacked layers, each with clean lines and subtle architectural detailing, including a projecting ledge and decorative brackets. One corner of the structure features a section of exposed brickwork, adding a touch of visual interest and suggesting historical layering or restoration. The overall design is austere and monumental, evoking neoclassical or ancient Roman influences, and is suitable for placement in a public square or park.
description: A monumental gray stone obelisk with a multi-tiered base, fluted column, and exposed brickwork detail. The structure is austere and neoclassical, suitable for urban plazas or parks.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid rectangular shaft, projecting ledge, and exposed brickwork on the left corner, with the fluted column visible behind the main structure.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the central shaft, the adjacent fluted column with Corinthian capital, and the layered base with decorative brackets.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the plain surface of the shaft, the column receding into the background, and the layered base extending outward.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full width of the shaft, the layered base, and the column barely visible at the far edge.
attribute_base_design: The base is multi-tiered and rectangular, with several stacked layers. The lowest tier is broad and flat, supporting a narrower upper platform. Decorative brackets are present beneath the projecting ledge, and one corner features exposed brickwork. The materials appear to be stone and concrete, with clean, geometric lines.
attribute_tip_design: The tip of the obelisk is flat and unadorned, with no visible decorative features or tapering.
attribute_surrounding_features: A single fluted column with a Corinthian capital stands adjacent to the obelisk, partially integrated into the base. The structure is set on a paved platform with no additional surrounding features visible.
